evals.name: init-detects-stack-and-creates-structure
evals.prompt: 帮我在 f:/大模型项目/Synapse/Synapse-Solo/examples/solo-saas 项目里初始化 Synapse 记忆系统。这是一个已经有一些 meta 文件的测试项目，帮我看看 init 能不能正常跑完。
evals.expected_output: Agent runs init.sh, detects existing meta/ directory, skips existing nodes, detects tech stack from existing mod_project.md, generates MEMORY_MAP.md.

evals.name: init-single-module-fallback
evals.prompt: Initialize Synapse memory for an empty scratch project at f:/大模型项目/Synapse/test-fixtures/scratch-project (create it if it doesn't exist — it has no package.json, no src/ directories, just a README).
evals.expected_output: Agent detects unknown stack, creates only mod_project.md with status in-progress, warns about no detected modules, generates minimal MEMORY_MAP.

assertions.name: handles-unknown-stack
assertions.description: Does not crash on unknown stack

evals.name: init-copies-scripts-and-hooks
evals.prompt: Initialize Synapse at f:/大模型项目/Synapse/test-fixtures/fresh-init — this is a brand new project with package.json (React app). Make sure all helper scripts and hooks are copied over.
evals.expected_output: Agent runs init, scripts/ directory populated with 5+ scripts, scripts/hooks/ has 4 hook files, .claude/settings.json has hook registrations.

assertions.name: copies-scripts
assertions.description: Helper scripts are copied to project

evals.name: init-idempotent-rerun
evals.prompt: Re-run synapse-init on the already-initialized f:/大模型项目/Synapse/Synapse-Solo/examples/solo-saas. Verify existing nodes are not overwritten — they should show 'already exists' messages.
evals.expected_output: Agent re-runs init.sh, all existing files are skipped, script reports 'already exists' for each, exits successfully without modifying any existing .md files.
